events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk. Operating a crane near overhead power lines without a documented voltage determination, established minimum clearance (20 ft up to 350kV per OSHA 1926.1408 Table A), and encroachment-prevention controls (dedicated spotter, proximity alarm, or de-energize/ground) is a common but non-compliant shortcut — not acceptable journeyman practice given the electrocution hazard. Operations should halt until clearance is verified and controls are documented, though prep/rigging work outside the clearance zone can continue.
